blockers.description: Repo is still under ccarvel's account. Warren's GitHub username is needed to initiate transfer. See migrating.md for full 8-step checklist.

peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3 in .github/workflows/deploy.yml runs on Node.js 20. GitHub retires Node 20 on Sep 16 2026 (forced upgrade Jun 2 2026). Fix: swap to JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action@v4 with single-commit: true. Full before/after diff documented in README.md Build & deployment section.
assets/morejon.jpg is 6KB / very low resolution. assets/morejon_01_body.jpg appeared in assets/ as untracked this session — may be the replacement candidate. Verify and commit if correct.
